title: Threads of Hope

sections.label: Spoken
lines: "Hear my prayer, O Lord... let my cry come to You."

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My days fade like the evening shadow,
I am poured out like the dew.
The world turns, yet I am still,
Seeking the strength to make it through.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But You, O Lord, are my foundation,
From generation to generation,
Your name will rise when all is gone,
A beacon when the night is long.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hear my cry when the shadows fall,
Lift my soul when I’ve lost it all.
A flame burns faint but won’t expire,
From ash, You build the world with fire.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The stones of my heart crumble to dust,
My voice grows thin, yet I still trust.
Though the winds tear through my frame,
I cling to the power of Your name.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But You, O Lord, are my salvation,
Through the ruins, You bring creation.
Your promise whispers through the storm,
A shelter deep, a place that’s warm.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hear my cry when the shadows fall,
Lift my soul when I’ve lost it all.
A flame burns faint but won’t expire,
From ash, You build the world with fire.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The nations will rise, their hearts will mend,
Your truth will guide them to the end.
From Zion’s mount, Your light will shine,
A promise eternal, forever divine.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hear my cry when the shadows fall,
Lift my soul when I’ve lost it all.
A flame burns faint but won’t expire,
From ash, You build the world with fire.

sections.label: Outro
lines: "In the shelter of Your wings, I find my rest… my hope."

epigraph: and let my cry come unto thee
